text: IEC CDD: Summary and facts Facts to consider when providing or using CONTENT of IEC CDD @ The information model (and the architecture of the dictionary) of IEC CDD is based on ISO and IEC Standards @ The CONTENT of IEC CDD is based on ISO and IEC Standards @ The process for import/export/maintenance of CONTENT is based on ISO and IEC Standards (“ANNEX SK”) @ IECCDD is stable @ IECCDD is reliable and offer highest quality CONTENT (based on an consensus driven IEC validation process with skilled international experts) @ The CONTENT of IEC CDD is free of charge, but license conditions apply @ |ECCDD is international accepted and supported @ The CONTENT of IEC CDD is increasing rapidly with the decision from ISO to support IEC CDD @ IECCDD is the reference dictionary for other SEMANTIC data dictionaries (consortia, national, company) @ IEC CDD is supporting electronic data exchange for digitalization, Industry 4.0 and Smart Manufacturing If you consider to use IEC CDD or develop CONTENT for import into IEC CDD please contact IEC/SC3D or the national mirror committee of IEC/SC3D (DKE/K113). 1 Page 10 6. Rossi
